page_metadata.biotools__summary: Microarray Gene Expression and Network Evaluation Toolkit (MAGNET) is a web tool with three components: generation of coexpression networks, weighted protein-protein interaction networks and bimodality of coexpression.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Microarray Gene Expression and Network Evaluation Toolkit (MAGNET) is a web tool with three components: generation of coexpression networks, weighted protein-protein interaction networks and bimodality of coexpression.
